callaway_1994_recovery.method: test-dose response: day at which peak_open returns to 95% of fresh-sim peak
callaway_1994_recovery.tap_interpretation: Response recovery is dominated by acute+chronic (φ⁻⁸); the slow setpoint (φ⁻¹⁰) is the long-tail channel. The 14d observation may reflect the convolution of both.
